# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for Cloud Storage bucket that stores application backups. Use default settings without versioning or lifecycle management to keep configuration simple. This is for our backup storage that we'll enhance later based on retention requirements.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
  - name: {{ env 'DEPLOYMENT_MANAGER_PROJECT_ID' }}
    type: service
    properties:
      bucketName: app-backups-{{ env 'PROJECT_ID' }}

  - name: app-backup-bucket-storage-class-standard
    type: google-beta::storage.Bucket
    properties:
      bucketName: "{{ resources.[0].properties.bucketName }}"
      storageClass: STANDARD

  - name: app-backup-bucket-default-acl
    type: google-beta::storage.DefaultObjectAcl
    properties:
      bucketName: "{{ resources.[0].properties.bucketName }}"
